lemon_market_new_listings.description: The vehicle is in good condition. The exterior has minor cosmetic imperfections. The interior is clean with limited signs of use. All mechanical components are currently in proper working order.
Poor condition.

The vehicle is in fair condition. The body shows some signs of rust and several minor dents. Mechanically, the car is operational but will require maintenance in the near future. The interior exhibits visible wear and some staining.

This vehicle is in impeccable, showroom condition. It has been meticulously maintained and stored in a climate-controlled garage, showing absolutely no signs of wear inside or out. The exterior paint is original and flawless, with a deep shine and no imperfections. The interior remains factory-fresh, with all materials perfectly preserved. Mechanically, the car performs flawlessly, reflecting its low mileage and rigorous maintenance schedule. This is a rare opportunity to own a truly pristine, investment-grade example.

Step into a reliable and stylish ride with this fantastic vehicle! It is in good condition and has been well-maintained to ensure a smooth, dependable driving experience. While it shows some light, standard signs of use, it remains a wonderful choice for anyone seeking quality and performance on the road.

This vehicle is in mint, showroom condition and has been meticulously cared for. The exterior paint is flawless, retaining its original deep luster without a single scratch or chip. Inside, the cabin is immaculate, with the upholstery and trim appearing brand new and showing no signs of use. Mechanically, it is in perfect working order, delivering a smooth and powerful driving experience with no issues whatsoever. This is a rare find for a buyer seeking a vehicle that looks and drives exactly as it did when it first left the dealership.

We are pleased to present this exceptionally well-maintained vehicle, offering a superior balance of performance and long-term reliability. This unit has undergone a rigorous inspection to ensure mechanical integrity and aesthetic refinement. Representing a distinguished choice for the discerning driver, it remains in commendable condition and is prepared for immediate delivery. Experience a vehicle that exemplifies both engineering excellence and lasting value.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my trusty ride, and honestly, it’s been such a joy to drive. It’s in really nice shape and has been super reliable for me. If you’re looking for a solid, well-loved car that’s ready for your next adventure, this is definitely the one! Come take it for a spin—you’re going to love how it feels on the road!

This E46 M3 is a mechanically sound example featuring the high-revving S54 inline-six engine and a precise 6-speed Getrag manual transmission. The vehicle has undergone critical preventative maintenance, including rear subframe reinforcement and a comprehensive double-VANOS system overhaul. The suspension geometry is maintained via upgraded bushings and Bilstein dampers, ensuring the chassis remains composed under lateral load. With valve clearances recently shimmed to factory specifications and a limited-slip differential that locks predictably, this M3 offers a raw, analog driving experience. Showing minor cosmetic patina consistent with its age, it remains a performance-first machine with a robust powertrain and sharp throttle response.
Reliable used car. Good condition. Well-maintained. Clean interior and exterior. Ready for drive.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers a premium driving experience with a focus on reliability and comfort. The exterior features a brilliant finish that catches the light beautifully, showing only minor, expected signs of careful use. Inside, the cabin is a sanctuary of well-preserved leather upholstery and polished trim, free from any odors or significant wear. Every electronic component, from the dual-zone climate control to the responsive touchscreen interface, functions exactly as intended. Under the hood, the engine runs smoothly and quietly, benefiting from a documented history of timely oil changes and preventative maintenance. The suspension remains firm and responsive, and the tires provide excellent grip with plenty of life left. This is a solid, honest car that has been treated with respect and is ready for many more miles of dependable service.

This vehicle represents a distinguished choice for those seeking a balance of proven performance and refined aesthetics. Maintained to a high standard, the automobile exhibits robust mechanical health and a professional presentation throughout. We invite you to acquire this reliable asset, which has been prepared to deliver immediate value and long-term service.

We are pleased to present this meticulously maintained vehicle, which exemplifies a harmonious balance of performance and long-term value. This unit has undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection to ensure mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. Featuring a well-preserved interior and a robust powertrain, it offers a sophisticated driving experience for the discerning buyer. This represents a premier opportunity to acquire a reliable, high-caliber automobile from a trusted professional source.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my reliable ride, and it's been such a joy to drive. It’s in really solid shape and has been well-loved, making it perfect for someone looking for a dependable car without the new-car price tag. Everything runs smoothly, and it's ready for its next adventure with you! Feel free to reach out if you want to take it for a spin!

This powerplant features VarioCam Plus variable valve timing and a integrated dry-sump lubrication system, ensuring peak performance and oil pressure stability under high-load conditions. Used car. Good condition. Well-maintained. Clean title. Reliable performance.

This meticulously maintained vehicle strikes the perfect balance between performance and luxury. The exterior retains a deep, glossy finish with only minor road wear consistent with careful ownership, while the smoke-free interior features supple leather and pristine trim. Mechanically, the car is in robust health, benefiting from a rigorous preventative maintenance schedule and a clean service history. It offers a smooth, responsive drive with all electronic features and climate controls functioning perfectly. This is a reliable, turn-key example for a discerning buyer who values a car that has been treated with genuine pride of ownership.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies mechanical integrity and sustained performance. This vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver seeking a harmonious balance of performance and long-term value. Its history of consistent care ensures continued prestige on the road. We invite you to experience the caliber of this exceptional offering firsthand.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my trusty ride, and it has been such a joy to own. It’s in really solid shape and has been super reliable for me—definitely ready for its next big adventure! I’ve taken great care of it, so it still runs like a dream and is perfect for everything from daily commutes to weekend road trips. You’re going to love how it handles. Come take it for a spin and see for yourself!

This E46 M3 features the legendary S54 3.2L naturally aspirated inline-six, delivering linear power delivery up to an 8,000 RPM redline. The chassis remains taut with upgraded bushings and a reinforced subframe, ensuring optimal torsional rigidity. Equipped with a Getrag 6-speed manual and a variable M differential lock, the mechanical engagement is pure. Recent service includes a VANOS overhaul and valve adjustment, maintaining peak volumetric efficiency. It sits on a refreshed suspension with Bilstein B16 coilovers, offering precise damping and rebound control for spirited driving. A mechanically sound, driver-focused example of an analog icon.
Well-maintained vehicle. Good condition. Reliable performance. Clean interior. No mechanical issues.

This exceptionally well-cared-for vehicle presents a fantastic opportunity for a discerning buyer who values both performance and presentation. The exterior paint retains a brilliant luster with only minor, age-appropriate imperfections, while the interior has been remarkably preserved, featuring plush, smoke-free upholstery and a pristine dashboard. Under the hood, the engine runs flawlessly, backed by a comprehensive service history that documents its consistent upkeep and mechanical integrity. All electronic components, from the premium audio system to the climate control, are fully operational, ensuring a comfortable and secure driving experience. Garage-kept and treated with genuine pride of ownership, this car drives smooth and quiet, making it a reliable and stylish choice for its next owner.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies mechanical reliability and sophisticated design. This unit has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for performance and safety. Featuring a clean interior and a well-preserved exterior, it offers a refined driving experience for the professional seeking both value and distinction. A definitive choice for those who prioritize long-term dependability.

This vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking a balance of performance and value. Meticulously maintained and presenting in commendable condition, the automobile exhibits consistent mechanical integrity and a refined aesthetic. Every system has been thoroughly vetted to ensure operational excellence. This is a turnkey acquisition for those who demand reliability without compromise.

Hey there! I’m selling my trusty car and it’s honestly been such a joy to drive. It's in really solid shape and has been super reliable for me. Whether you're commuting or heading out on a road trip, this ride is ready to go! It's clean, runs great, and is looking for a new home where it'll be appreciated just as much. Feel free to reach out if you want to come see it!

Used vehicle. Good condition. Well-maintained. Clean title. Everything functions as expected.

This 2019 Executive Sedan represents a fantastic balance of luxury and reliability for the discerning driver. The exterior is finished in a sophisticated Charcoal Metallic that retains a deep luster, showing only the minor, expected signs of careful road use. Step inside to a cabin defined by supple, cream-colored leather seating and genuine wood accents that have been preserved with pride. Every feature, from the premium surround-sound system to the heated power seats and dual-zone climate control, functions exactly as intended. Under the hood, the turbocharged engine delivers smooth, responsive power, paired with a transmission that shifts effortlessly. This vehicle has been strictly maintained according to the manufacturer's schedule, with a documented service history and a recent multi-point inspection confirming its mechanical integrity. It is a turnkey daily driver that offers a premium experience without the new-car price tag.

Presented in commendable condition, this vehicle exemplifies mechanical integrity and sustained aesthetic appeal. It has been subject to a comprehensive professional assessment to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for performance and safety. Offering a refined driving experience and a well-documented history of care, this selection represents a superior investment for the discerning driver who prioritizes both reliability and prestige in a pre-owned motorcar.
